📖 How to Use

Select your university's grading system, then use the appropriate tab: enter your courses to calculate semester GPA, compute your new cumulative GPA, or find out what GPA you need to reach your goal.

⚠️ Note

📌 Verbal classifications and their ranges may vary between universities. Check your university's system to confirm
